gauge.name: Luxapallila Creek at Millport

impacts.statement: Water begins to overflow the road and bridge along Highway 17 at the gage site.
As water rises above 17 feet, some homes along Fernbank Road and Highway 17 are at risk of flooding.
Some lower areas of Fernbank Road will begin to flood.
Expansive pasture land and forest area flooding up and down the stream from near Millport to the state line.
Most of the pasture land and forest are flooded around the gage site.
Area pasture land begins to flood.

dataAttribution.title: Observations courtesy of U.S. Geological Survey

hydronotes.statement: Current stage readings for the Luxapallila Creek at Millport are unrepresentative of natural hydrologic flow. Significant and persistent downstream blockages and logjams are causing the creek to experience a chronic backwater effect. The gage will likely remain at or above previously established flood stages until further notice

gauge.forecastReliability: Forecasts are not available. Only observed stages are available for this point.
